name: player_adp single year_offset under a year split correlates per base-year row
description: With splits=[year] the join correlates cte.year = player_years.year + 1, so each base-year row shows the next-year ADP. The adp CTE is offset-expanded to cover the shifted years.
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023,2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f" as (select "player_adp_index"."pid", "player_adp_index"."year", "player_adp_index"."adp", "player_adp_index"."min_pick", "player_adp_index"."max_pick", "player_adp_index"."std_dev", "player_adp_index"."sample_size", "player_adp_index"."percent_drafted" from "player_adp_index" inner join "adp_format" on "player_adp_index"."adp_format_id" = "adp_format"."id" where "player_adp_index"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "player_adp_index"."year" in (2023, 2024) and "adp_format"."scoring_class" in ('PPR') and "adp_format"."num_qb" in (1) and "adp_format"."duration" in ('REDRAFT') and "adp_format"."draft_pool" in ('ALL') and "adp_format"."contest_style" in ('MANAGED') and "player_adp_index"."adp" < 999) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f"."adp" AS "adp_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f" on "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.year = player_years.year + 1 group by player.fname, player.lname, "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f"."adp", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
